session.summary: Post-Thirteen-Scrolls cleanup. Removed 110 lines of dead migration code from seed.js (phase-5-chapter-backfill-v1 and sproutlab-chapter-backfill-v3 — all data now live via snippets + GitHub sync). Updated Codex current_phase in seed data from 'Phase 2 complete' to 'Phase 5 complete — content depth, 13 SproutLab chapters, 5 apocrypha, SW v7'. Confirmed old apocrypha stubs (apo-0002/0003/0004) already soft-deleted. Confirmed all Codex TODOs (0001–0006) already resolved in live data. Discovered canon number collision: canon-0033-gitignore-data-protection and canon-0033-root-index-sync share the 0033 prefix. Logged as known debt.
decisions: Dead migrations removed — CODEX_MIGRATIONS array cleared, runner infra preserved in start.js
Canon 0033 number collision logged as known debt (full string IDs are unique, no system breakage)
open_todos: Canon number collision: canon-0033-gitignore-data-protection and canon-0033-root-index-sync share 0033 prefix
session.handoff: seed.js cleaned. Next major item: SproutLab GitHub Sync — porting Codex WAL + GitHub API sync to protect Ziva's data from browser resets.

todo.text: Fix canon number collision: canon-0033-gitignore-data-protection and canon-0033-root-index-sync both use 0033. Renumber root-index-sync to 0035 and sw-never-cache-html to 0036. Requires delete+create (ID rename not patchable).

patch.summary: Two cleanup sessions: (1) TODO cleanup — resolved 5 open TODOs, added renderStorageUsage prefix scan, trash apocrypha section, canon_updates + todo_updates in snippet pipeline. (2) Post-Thirteen-Scrolls cleanup — removed 110 lines of dead migration code from seed.js, updated Codex current_phase in seed, logged canon-0033 number collision as known debt.
